description: Delta and patch ledger from adversarial governance review session. All entries have been reviewed, fixed where needed, and integrated into the .codex/ tree.

entries.purpose: Formalize SEALED vs SOURCE-LIMITED governance state to prevent drift and overclaiming
entries.rationale: Adversarial review showed DMDU/RDM claims were being enforced without evidence categorization. SEALED/SOURCE-LIMITED distinction prevents silent elevation.

entries.purpose: Codify ScenarioSet semantics allowing enumeration OR generative definition, prohibiting enumeration-only mandates
entries.rationale: Primary DMDU/RDM literature supports explicit scenario spaces without mandating enumeration. Schema converted from YAML to JSON Schema to match repo convention.

entries.purpose: Codify multi-family robustness metrics with no canonical equation mandate
entries.rationale: RDM/DMDU literature allows multiple robustness notions. Schema requires metric declaration + rationale, prohibits canonical equation lock-in.

entries.purpose: Mandatory claim-strength labeling for all normative statements, including Wikipedia prohibition
entries.rationale: Prevents future silent upgrades from SOURCE-LIMITED to enforced. Wikipedia prohibition codified as load-bearing source ban.

entries.purpose: Sandbox + acquisition channels bind decisions to reality (MPP R2.5)
entries.rationale: Decision Engine was making choices without checking what the environment can actually do. R2.5 gate fails closed if toolbox reality is missing.

entries.purpose: Prevent OS freezing during exploratory phases
entries.rationale: Sealing requires explicit user command; no auto-freeze during active work.

entries.purpose: Decision engine selects options autonomously unless USER_REQUIRED
entries.rationale: Agent should select from valid options rather than always deferring. USER_REQUIRED flag gates when human input is needed.

entries.purpose: Track how MetaBlooms affects the LLM itself (calibration, hallucination, abstention)
entries.rationale: Requires measurement infrastructure that doesn't exist yet in the governance system.
entries.not_done_reason: No mechanical way to measure LLM calibration/hallucination rate from within the governance system. Needs external tooling.

entries.purpose: Enable Claude-style built-right architectural decisions (Feistel-class choices)
entries.rationale: Pattern selection requires a pattern library that doesn't exist yet.
entries.not_done_reason: No pattern library or DecisionRecord schema exists to implement this against. Needs DecisionRecord.schema.json first.

entries.purpose: Make sandbox map a governed artifact, not just a note
entries.rationale: sandbox_map_source field in TOOLBOX_REALITY schema enables binding to an authoritative map.

entries.purpose: Align sandbox_tools_bulk_bundle with Decision Engine inputs
entries.rationale: tool_corpus_binding field in TOOLBOX_REALITY schema enables binding to tool corpus.

entries.purpose: Fix dangling references between toolbox, sandbox, and SEE
entries.rationale: TOOLBOX_REALITY schema now explicitly binds sandbox map + tool corpus, eliminating dangling references.

entries.purpose: Enforce Row R2.5 in MPP with fail-closed gate
entries.rationale: R2.5 must be mechanically enforced, not just documented. Gate registered in master governance runner.

entries.purpose: Record durable write receipt for all governance artifacts from this integration
entries.rationale: Auditability — proves state was materialized, not just discussed.

deferred_items.reason: Awaits formal robustness math SEE investigation

deferred_items.item: Representation comparison (JSON vs YAML vs Protobuf)
deferred_items.reason: Repo convention is JSON Schema — no comparison needed
Needs pattern library + DecisionRecord schema first
